chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 4622 of 2025 [Muhammad Aamir Siddiqui versus Federation of Pakistan & others] Petitioner: Muhammad Aamir Siddiqui son of Muhammad Yameen Siddiqui through Mr. Abdul Majeed Khoso, Advocate. Date of hearing: 13-10-2025 Date of decision: 13-10-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Pursuant to the objection to the maintainability of the petition vide order dated 29-09-2025, counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner has now filed an appeal provided in section 12G of the Regulation of Generation, Transmission and Distribution of Electric Power Act, 1997 before the Appellate Tribunal. However, he submits that at present the Appellate Tribunal is not functional and therefore seeks orders of this Court for certain interim measures. In that case, the Petitioner is free to file a fresh petition with that plea. With that observation, this petition is dismissed alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
